_meta.description: Educational programs for school groups and field trips - staff can update offerings, descriptions, and details
_meta.staffInstructions: This file controls educational program offerings on the website. Staff can add new programs, update descriptions, change durations, and adjust capacity limits.

fieldGuide.id: Unique identifier - use lowercase with dashes (example: 'living-history-tour')
fieldGuide.name: Display name for the program
fieldGuide.duration: How long the program takes (example: '90 minutes')
fieldGuide.capacity: Maximum group size or range (example: '25-60 students')
fieldGuide.description: 1-2 sentence description of what students experience
fieldGuide.tnStandards: Array of Tennessee curriculum standards covered
fieldGuide.includes: Array of activities included in the program
fieldGuide.price: Price in CENTS per student (multiply dollars by 100)
fieldGuide.minimumStudents: Minimum number of students required to book
fieldGuide.bookingLeadTime: How far in advance groups must book

rules: Keep program IDs unique and lowercase with dashes
Grade ranges should use standard format: 'K-12', '3-5', 'PreK', etc.
Duration should include units: '90 minutes', '2 hours', 'Half day'
commonMistakes: Using dollar amounts instead of cents for price
Forgetting to update both the program AND the booking form
Setting capacity too high without checking with operations

newProgram.name: Your Program Name
newProgram.description: Brief description of what students will experience and learn.

_aiRules.description: Rules for AI assistants editing this file
beforeEditing: ALWAYS verify changes with user before committing
prohibited: Do NOT make changes without user awareness
Do NOT change program prices without approval

programs.name: Living History Tour
programs.description: Full site tour with costumed interpreters demonstrating frontier life. Students interact with historical characters and see authentic 1790s activities.
includes: Guided tour of all historic buildings

programs.name: Tour & Craft
programs.description: Living history tour plus hands-on craft activity. Students create a period-appropriate craft to take home.

programs.name: Living History Sampler
programs.description: Condensed experience perfect for younger learners. Focus on one or two demonstrations with age-appropriate explanations.

programs.name: Preschool Program
programs.description: Gentle introduction to history for our youngest visitors. Interactive storytelling and sensory experiences.

programs.name: Virtual Programs
programs.description: Bring Rocky Mount to your classroom via live video. Interactive Q&A with costumed interpreters.
programs._note: Price is per session, not per student

funding._staffNote: Update annually as grant programs change

sources.name: Tennessee Arts Commission
sources.description: Grants available for arts-integrated field trips

sources.name: OVTA Funding
sources.description: Overmountain Victory Trail Association educational grants

sources.name: Title I Funds
sources.description: Many Title I schools can use funds for educational field trips

bookingInfo.cancellationPolicy: 48 hours notice required for full refund
